title: Panoptes Helm chart values
description: Schema validated by `helm lint`/`helm install`. The load-bearing constraint is the NON-EMPTY oauth2Proxy.githubOrg: an empty org disables the GitHub allowlist (oauth2-proxy v7.7.1 admits any user when Org==''), so the schema rejects it at lint/install time, complementing the template's `required` fail-closed guard.

githubOrg.description: The GitHub org allowlist — the access boundary. MUST be non-empty; an empty org disables the allowlist and admits any GitHub user.

kubernetesRbac.description: Opt-in in-cluster read-only RBAC for the kubernetes source (default false). When true, renders the minimal docs/IAM.md ClusterRole + binding to the panoptes-collector SA.
